nodes.context: Yakuza organization based in Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan, with about 60 active members.
Kitakyushu-based yakuza syndicate, one of five independent Fukuoka-based designated syndicates.
Kurume-based yakuza syndicate, one of five independent Fukuoka-based designated syndicates.
One of five independent Fukuoka-based designated yakuza syndicates.
One of five independent Fukuoka-based designated yakuza syndicates.
Major yakuza syndicate, opposed by the Yonsha-kai federation.
Kumamoto-based yakuza syndicate, member of the Yonsha-kai federation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.
edges.context: Taishu-kai and Kudo-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
